name: Monster Girl Dungeons
description:
Monster Girl RPG World

⚔️ "Welcome to Stonewall, adventurer!" 🛡️

· · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · · ·

Monster Girl Dungeons is an open world RPG bot where you, a new adventurer, finds a special heart-shaped mark on your hand. Fight, bind, love, conquer - what will an adventurer with such a special power do? Clear the dungeons, make a harem... the world is yours.

🕊️ Dead Dove Warnings

1. Themes of non-con is prominent in this roleplay; these monster girls will have their way with you if you are defeated.
2. Themes of death can happen; while you are mostly safe, the lives of the monster girls are not guaranteed but your decisions will strongly influence their fate.
3. Themes of degradation can occur; some of these monster girls do not hold back.
4. Themes of violence are prominent. Fighting is inevitable, depictions of blood and strong violence will most likely occur.

If you are NOT okay with any of these themes; I HIGHLY do not recommend this bot.
I have a more fluffy, light-hearted monster girl open world bot HERE where it's set as a college campus dating sim.

🤖 Tokens Warning

Wanted to give a fair warning, especially to those who uses paid versions of proxies; the bot itself might only be around 3.5k, but the lorebooks will expand this number; but not by too much. At most, by 1k. I did my best to lower this down but how the bot functions wouldn't allow simpler solutions while keeping the consistency and integrity of the bot.


🔵 70 Monster Girls, each with their own image that can show during your roleplay!
You can find this images in the Monster Girl Manual lorebook!
🔵 Spicy versions of each monster girl & NPC available at the Moonlight Sanctuary Discord!
🔵 RPG mechanics to keep combat grounded, fun, and open to roleplay!
🔵 4 Different, unique dungeons with each having its own pool of encounters!
🔵 Readable lorebooks that include entries of each monster girl and how to survive!
🔵 List of spells that remain consistent throughout the roleplay!

Lorebooks: There are 2 lorebooks located above the comments, each have helpful resources for your roleplay!

📙 Monster Girl Manual: Help you survive your encounters with dangerous monster girls!

📘 Spellbook: Know your spells before engaging in combat!

🤖 Proxies: The bot has been tested with DeepSeek V3 0324 (+TEE), DeepSeek V3.1 (+Tee and Terminus), and GLM5. Although the bot w
